name: Learn
description: Find & install agent skills. The /learn command for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, and more.
review: This skill provides a comprehensive and well-thought-out solution for dynamic skill management. It effectively turns an agent into a self-improving system. The documentation is exemplary, and the security precautions are robust and detailed. This skill is a foundational component for a healthy and secure skill ecosystem. It addresses a fundamental need for agents to be able to dynamically acquire new capabilities, making it incredibly useful.
